name: Finwise Bancorp
summary: FinWise Bancorp is a bank holding company for FinWise Bank, which operates in traditional banking and financial technology (fintech) sectors. The Bank provides banking-as-a-service (BaaS) through Strategic Programs, a nationwide strategic relationship program serving fintech companies. It also offers SBA Section 7(a) loans as an SBA Preferred Lender, and provides Fintech Banking and Payment Solutions services. The company also operates FinWise Investment, LLC as a wholly owned subsidiary.

products.name: Strategic Programs
products.description: Nationwide strategic relationship programs providing banking-as-a-service to fintech companies.

products.name: SBA Section 7(a) Loans
products.description: Small Business Administration loan products offered through FinWise Bank as an SBA Preferred Lender.

products.name: Fintech Banking and Payment Solutions
products.description: Banking and payment services provided to fintech service providers and partners.

partnerships.description: Strategic Programs partnerships with fintech companies for banking and payment services.
